description_long: This hamburger features a soft, lightly browned bun with a smooth, matte finish. The top bun sits atop a generous layer of fresh green leaf lettuce, followed by thick slices of ripe red tomato and rings of white onion. A slice of melted yellow cheese drapes over a well-cooked beef patty, which is nestled above the bottom bun. The ingredients are neatly stacked, with the lettuce and tomato providing a vibrant contrast to the golden cheese and dark patty. No sesame seeds or packaging are visible, and the overall appearance is appetizing and classic.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain, soft bun, fresh lettuce, tomato, onion, melted cheese, and a beef patty, all neatly layered.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full stack of lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese, and patty beneath a smooth, plain bun.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the melted cheese and visible onion rings, with the lettuce and tomato peeking out.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the patty and the even layering of cheese, tomato, and lettuce.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the glossy tomato slices, cheese, and crisp lettuce, with the bun's smooth surface prominent.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce forms the base layer above the bottom bun, followed by tomato slices, onion rings, and a slice of cheese melted over the beef patty, all stacked neatly beneath the top bun.
